message:
bead-state: close bd-ml2r.5, bd-ml2r.6, bd-ml2r.10 trees

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -444,9 +444,9 @@
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.5","title":"[FNX] Ordering tie-break enrichment using centrality","description":"Goal
Use fnx centrality signals to improve rank ordering tie-breaks and reduce visual clutter.

Scope
- Compute optional centrality pre-pass (initially undirected-compatible metrics).
- Inject scores into ordering/tie-break stages in Sugiyama refinement.
- Add ablation mode to compare baseline vs fnx-assisted ordering.

Acceptance Criteria
- Ordering remains deterministic with stable score tie-break keys.
- Quality improves on dense benchmark set without unacceptable latency hit.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:36.642372498Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-13T19:01:47.197782531Z","closed_at":"2026-04-13T19:01:47.197172415Z","close_reason":"Integrated centrality tie-breaks into barycenter ordering with test","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["centrality","fnx","layout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.5","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:36.642372498Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.5","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:37.729649845Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.5","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:37.795375208Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.5","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.4.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:11.634328784Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.5","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.4.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T22:22:11.690800326Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.5.1","title":"[FNX] Ordering subtask: centrality cache and stable normalization","description":"Goal
Implement centrality cache and deterministic consumption in layout pipeline.

Scope
- Cache keyed by graph hash and projection mode.
- Inject scores into node priority map without unstable floating ordering.
- Add deterministic quantization/normalization policy.

Acceptance Criteria
- Cache hit/miss behavior is traceable.
- No nondeterministic ordering in repeated runs.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:36.717538332Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-13T18:43:08.876022562Z","closed_at":"2026-04-13T18:43:08.875816673Z","close_reason":"Implemented fnx_ordering.rs module with: QuantizedScore for deterministic ordering, compute_centrality_scores for caching, compare_with_centrality for tie-breaking, centrality_cache_key for stable cache keys. 11 unit tests.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cache","fnx","layout"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.5.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:36.717538332Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.5.2","title":"[FNX] Ordering subtask: ablation benchmark and adoption threshold","description":"Goal
Create an ablation benchmark to validate quality gain versus runtime cost for centrality-assisted ordering.

Scope
- Run baseline and fnx-assisted variants over representative corpus.
- Measure crossings, edge length variance, rank compactness, total layout ms.
- Establish adoption thresholds.

Acceptance Criteria
- Decision report clearly states when fnx centrality should be enabled by default.
- CI has deterministic benchmark-mode smoke checks.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests

- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks

- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy

- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:36.795128125Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-13T18:45:46.453303293Z","closed_at":"2026-04-13T18:45:46.452847661Z","close_reason":"Added ablation benchmark with AblationResult/AblationSummary structs, run_ablation_single function, and 5 CI-friendly tests. Thresholds: centrality recommended when < 1ms (1000us). Tests verify small graph fast, medium graph reasonable, determinism, and adoption smoke check.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["benchmark","fnx","layout-quality"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.5.2","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:36.795128125Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
-{"id":"bd-ml2r.6","title":"[FNX] Witness and telemetry integration across parser/layout/CLI/WASM","description":"Goal
Plumb fnx complexity witnesses into frankenmermaid traces so algorithm decisions are explainable and auditable.

- Add CLI JSON emission for witness artifacts.
- Ensure wasm APIs can surface witness/analysis metadata for browser tooling.

- Traces clearly connect decision -> algorithm -> witness -> output quality.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):

 {"id":"bd-ml2r.7","title":"[FNX] Directed capability gap-closure plan with franken_networkx upstream","description":"Goal
Close directed-algorithm gaps in franken_networkx needed for deeper layout integration in later phases.

Background
Current Rust fnx capabilities are strongest on undirected Graph operations. Deeper replacement of directed layout internals requires DiGraph-native algorithms and semantics.

Scope
- Define required directed primitives for frankenmermaid layout integration.
- Coordinate upstream implementation plan and versioning.
- Add compatibility tests in frankenmermaid against targeted fnx versions.

Acceptance Criteria
- Directed capability matrix exists with explicit status per required algorithm.
- Version pinning and upgrade policy documented.
- Integration tests fail fast on unsupported fnx capability regressions.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:37.094065988Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:23:25.175584022Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["digraph","fnx","upstream"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.7","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:37.094065988Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.7","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:38.063891746Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.7.1","title":"[FNX] Upstream subtask: minimum directed algorithm surface","description":"Goal
Specify and implement the minimum directed algorithm set needed for phase-2 layout integration.

Scope
- Candidate set: SCC, weakly/strongly connected components, directed cycle basis alternatives, directed bridges/cut-like signals where appropriate.
- Define deterministic output ordering contracts.
- Add conformance fixtures mirroring frankenmermaid integration scenarios.

Acceptance Criteria
- Directed algorithms exist upstream with documented complexity and determinism behavior.
- frankenmermaid test corpus exercises these APIs through adapter layer.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
1) Unit tests
- Add comprehensive unit tests for happy path, edge cases, malformed input, and error paths for all touched modules.

2) Integration tests
- Add cross-crate integration coverage for touched parser/layout/render/CLI/WASM boundaries.

3) End-to-end tests
- Add or update reproducible E2E scripts that exercise user-visible flows affected by this bead.
- E2E scripts must run non-interactively and be CI-friendly.

4) Structured logging and evidence
- Emit machine-readable logs with at least these fields:
  `scenario_id`, `input_hash`, `fnx_mode`, `projection_mode`, `decision_mode`, `fnx_algorithm`, `parse_ms`, `analysis_ms`, `layout_ms`, `render_ms`, `diagnostic_count`, `fallback_reason`, `witness_hash`, `output_hash`, `pass_fail_reason`.
- Store artifacts/logs in deterministic, inspectable paths suitable for regression triage.

5) Determinism and regression checks
- Run repeated executions on representative scenarios (>=5 runs) and assert stable outputs/log summaries.
- Add explicit regression assertions for any metric or output changed by this bead.

6) Quality gates and build policy
- Required checks: `cargo check --workspace --all-targets`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, `cargo fmt --check`, and relevant `cargo test` scopes.
- All CPU-intensive cargo operations must be executed via `rch exec -- <cargo ...>` and captured in evidence notes/logs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:37.165411457Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-27T22:23:25.235198803Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["algorithms","digraph","fnx"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-ml2r.7.1","depends_on_id":"bd-ml2r.7","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-27T21:52:37.165411457Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-ml2r.7.2","title":"[FNX] Upstream subtask: version pinning and compatibility matrix","description":"Goal
Establish release and compatibility discipline between frankenmermaid and franken_networkx.

- Add CI checks for API drift and behavioral drift.

Acceptance Criteria
- Version policy prevents silent breakage.
- CI catches capability regressions before merge.","acceptance_criteria":"Mandatory Quality and Verification Contract (applies in addition to bead-specific requirements):
